name: Frederic Pickleball Courts
description: Frederic Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Frederic, WI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Grace & MJ Memorial Courts
description: Grace & MJ Memorial Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clayton, WI. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: South Twin Park Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at South Twin Park Pickleball Courts in Amery, WI! There are 8 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: St Croix Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at St Croix Pickleball in Saint Croix Falls, WI! There are 3 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.
